description.en: Requests the user's permission to access device motion data from the accelerometer and gyroscope sensors. Returns aPromisethat resolves with a string of"granted"or"denied".

excerpt.es: Requests the user's permission to access device motion data from the accelerometer and gyroscope sensors. Returns aPromisethat resolves with a string of"granted"or"denied".
excerpt.en: Requests the user's permission to access device motion data from the accelerometer and gyroscope sensors. Returns aPromisethat resolves with a string of"granted"or"denied".

description.en: Requests the user's permission to access device orientation data. Returns aPromisethat resolves with a string of"granted"or"denied".

excerpt.es: Requests the user's permission to access device orientation data. Returns aPromisethat resolves with a string of"granted"or"denied".
excerpt.en: Requests the user's permission to access device orientation data. Returns aPromisethat resolves with a string of"granted"or"denied".

description.en: An object giving the rate of change of the device's orientation on the three orientation axis alpha, beta and gamma. Rotation rate is expressed in degrees per seconds.

excerpt.es: An object giving the rate of change of the device's orientation on the three orientation axis alpha, beta and gamma. Rotation rate is expressed in degrees per seconds.
excerpt.en: An object giving the rate of change of the device's orientation on the three orientation axis alpha, beta and gamma. Rotation rate is expressed in degrees per seconds.
